mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_messages (session_id, role, content, reasoning_content, tool_calls, tool_call_id, `name`, msg_index, tokens, metadata) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{reasoningContent}, #{toolCalls}, #{toolCallId}, #{name}, #{msgIndex}, #{tokens}, #{metadata})

INSERT INTO ai_chat_messages (session_id, role, content, reasoning_content, tool_calls, tool_call_id, `name`, msg_index, tokens, metadata) VALUES
(#{msg.sessionId}, #{msg.role}, #{msg.content}, #{msg.reasoningContent}, #{msg.toolCalls}, #{msg.toolCallId}, #{msg.name}, #{msg.msgIndex}, #{msg.tokens}, #{msg.metadata})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(msg_index), -1) FROM ai_chat_messages WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
